name: Daddy's Dark Pumpernickel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the dry ingredients to your bread machine in the recommended order.
2. Pour in the liquids after the dry ingredients have been added.
3. If using Fleishmans yeast, increase the amount as needed.
4. This recipe will produce a 1 lb loaf.
5. The recipe was tested and created by Robert Birr, incorporating elements from the Panasonic manual, Donna German's recipe, and some imaginative adjustments.
6. Posted by: J.MAGUIRE - GEnie Reposted by: Debbie Carlson - Cooking Echo
